name: openmart-mcp-server
description: Find local businesses and their decision-maker contacts with Openmart.

openmart_api_key.title: Openmart API Key
openmart_api_key.description: Create one at https://app.openmart.com/api-management (requires a paid plan).

tools.name: find_business
tools.description: Search local / SMB businesses by location, category, rating, price tier, and more.

tools.name: find_decision_maker
tools.description: Find decision-maker contacts (email, phone, LinkedIn) at companies by job title.

tools.name: get_batch_results
tools.description: Collect the results of an async find_decision_maker batch.
